name: KFC Macaroni/Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Sweet midget pickles, chop (not relish)
2 tbsp Pimiento, chopped or 1/2 small Tomato, seed and chopped
recipeInstructions:
DRESSING - Combine dressing ingredients and set aside.
MACARONI SALAD - In a large bowl, combine remaining salad ingredients. Coat well with the dressing. Refrigerate at least an hour before serving.
POTATO SALAD - Substitute 8 cups cooked, peeled, cubed cold potatoes for the macaroni. Increase celery to 1 cup and substitute chopped green onions for the dried onion. Add up to 1 cup of pitted black and/or stuffed green olives in either salad.
Source: Glorie Pitzer.
